story.text:
# ✨ Distill Quintessence
**⿻ → 🔥 → 💧 → 🪶**
*aether · cosmological · (cosmological)*

The alchemical operation: distill V(π, t) from the corpus's accumulated tales. The magnum opus of the Zero Spellbook reduced to its incorruptible essence.

> The 30 tales are the Great Work. V(π, t) is the Quintessence distilled.

*Keywords:* quintessence · alchemy · distill · v-pi-t · magnum-opus · cosmological
